title: taraxacum bufonium
intro: Taraxacum bufonium, also known as the Yellow Hawk's Beard or Greater Hawksbeard, is a perennial herb belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting kidney function. In herbal preparations, Taraxacum bufonium is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
